artifacts.description: OAuth2 provider configuration defining authentication flows, token lifetimes, and allowed redirect URIs
Multi-factor authentication settings including enforced methods and bypass rules
Role-based access control definitions mapping roles to permissions across application modules
Permissions matrix specifying granular access levels per role and resource type
Session management configuration including timeout duration, renewal policy, and invalidation triggers
CI/CD pipeline stage requiring manual approval before production deployment
Pull request review policy requiring minimum reviewers and passing checks before merge
CI/CD pipeline definition including build, test, staging, and production deployment stages
Infrastructure-as-code defining production environment resources and deployment configuration
Step-by-step rollback procedure for reverting failed production deployments
Automated rollback script that reverts the last production deployment to the previous known-good state
JSON Schema defining required fields, types, and constraints for incoming data records
Business rule definitions for input data validation including range checks and format requirements
Alert rule definitions for detecting anomalies including error rate thresholds and latency spikes
Monitoring dashboard configuration displaying key system health metrics and incident indicators
